use_cases: Display a single subscription pricing tier on a landing page
Show product features with price and CTA button
Present membership or service plan options with animated entrance
ai_summary: A minimalist single-tier pricing card component displaying a subscription option with price ($19/mo), feature list, and call-to-action button. Uses Framer Motion for entrance animations and includes subtle hover scale effects. Clean, flat design suitable for SaaS, educational platforms, or e-commerce pricing sections.
